March 2026 Core Update settled (8 Apr). B2B sites with topical authority seeing more stable rankings and higher-quality leads.

signals.text: Renewables & hydrogen growth — fuel cell plates and precision components align with green energy sector demand.
UK defence spending rising — aerospace & defence content aligns with government procurement uplift.
Far East supply chain pressure — creates opportunity for UK-based precision manufacturing.
SC21 Bronze for 6 consecutive years — powerful credibility signal for defence/aerospace procurement teams.

topAuditFindings: Zero meta descriptions across all 23+ pages
5 confirmed 404 errors in live navigation menu
No schema / structured data anywhere on site
NPS score (63%) and testimonials buried on sub-page — not visible on homepage
Blog drives traffic but converts none — no dates, no CTAs, no email capture
Only 4 case studies — 3 are under 50 words
delivery.insight: Site has solid bones and genuine credibility signals — but is optimised for warm leads only. The 6 critical fixes (meta descriptions, 404s, schema, testimonials, blog CTAs, case studies) should produce measurable improvement within 4–6 weeks.
nextSteps: Write meta descriptions for all 23+ pages (immediate)
Add publication dates to all blog posts
Surface NPS score and testimonials on homepage
Implement JSON-LD schema — FAQPage alone earns rich snippets
